role: Former Minister of Defense (2013–2017); IRGC Aerospace Force veteran
bio: Hossein Dehghan is an IRGC brigadier general who served as Defense Minister in [Hassan Rouhani](/people/hassan-rouhani)'s first cabinet (2013–2017). He joined the IRGC at its founding and commanded contingents in Lebanon and Syria in the early 1980s. He was Deputy Defense Minister under [Mohammad Khatami](/people/mohammad-khatami). Under Rouhani's second term he was replaced by Amir Hatami. He ran as a presidential candidate in 2021. He is subject to US and EU sanctions. He was a military adviser to [Ali Khamenei](/people/ali-khamenei) before his cabinet appointment.
editorial_notes: Born 1957. IRGC since founding. Commanded IRGC in Lebanon 1982–84. Deputy Defense Minister under Khatami. Defense Minister 2013–2017. Ran in 2021 presidential election.
